15    GDIV ELIG RPT DEFER ENTRY/TEXT:DEFERD ENTRY OF JDGMNT; DEF ENTS GLTYPLEA & REFRD TO MISD BEHAVIOR COURT/DEFT ADV RTS:2/FNDG/GTW/CPSS/ARBUCKLE/REMA/TWS/X:PROPOSED DISPOSITION AND CONDITION OF O,R,; DEF, MUST HAVE AT LEAST 1 EAR SUCCESSFUL ADHERENCE TO THE MBHC; WAIVER OF CTS UP TO SENTENCINGFOR MBHCONLY; OBEY ALL LAWS; RESTITUION IF ANY FOR ALL CHARGED CONDUCT; CPO REMAINSIN EFFECT, MAP PROVIDED TO PARTIES; POSSESS NO WEAPONS; NO ALCOHOLOR DRUGSWITHOUT PRSCRIPTION; DRUG AND ALCOHOL TESTING, NO NEW ARREST OR CPO VIOLATIONS;, IF DEFENDANT IS ARRESTED ON NEW CHARGES OR SAO VIOLATIONS, DEF, WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION AND REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT ANEW PLACEMENT OR TREATMENT PLAN/X:IF DEF, IS PLACED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM OR SUPPORTIVE HOUSING AND LEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED,DEF, WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION AND REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT ANEW PLACEMENT OR TREATMENT PLAN; IF DEF SUCCESSFULLY ABIDES BY THEABOVE CONDITONS & COMPLETES MBHC FOLLOWING AT LEAST 1 YEAR OF SUCCESSFULYADHERENCEAS AGREED UPON BY THE ENTIRE TEAM, THE DEJ PLEA MAY BE WITHDRAWN AND CHARGEWILL BE DISMISSED/
